title: DeleteAttributes
text: DeleteAttributes Delete the specified session attributes. Explain this code $webinfo("SESSIONCOMMANDS"), "DeleteAttributes",AttributeList Copy Parameters AttributeList —string (or variable or parameter evaluating to a string) containing one or more session attribute names, separated by semicolons. The attribute names are user-defined and case-sensitive. If omitted, no attributes are deleted. Description DeleteAttributes is executed on the current session. If the previous ChangeSession command was a CLOSE action, the DeleteAttributes command is ignored. Example: Deleting Session Attributes Explain this code putitem /id $webinfo ( "SESSIONCOMMANDS" ), "DeleteAttributes", "DATA1;Data2" Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
